message:
feat(vdbe): expand VDBE codegen with aggregate, subquery, and window function support

Adds +387 lines of VDBE bytecode generation covering:

- AggStep/AggFinal opcode emission for GROUP BY aggregate evaluation
- Correlated subquery codegen with proper register allocation
- Window function frame handling (ROWS/RANGE/GROUPS) with peer detection
- Expression compilation for CASE/WHEN, CAST, COALESCE, and NULLIF
- Improved register spilling strategy for complex nested expressions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
